p2p_enrich.notes: Added 2 repo CI pass_to_pass tests: test_repo_ruff_lint and test_repo_ruff_format. CI commands discovered: ruff check, ruff format --check (from .github/workflows/pre-commit.yml and .pre-commit-config.yaml). Full test suite requires many dependencies not available in minimal env.

validate.notes: All 4 checks passed: Docker build OK, NOP test reward=0 (5 expected failures on base commit), Gold test reward=1 (all 20 tests pass). Rubric ICR=0.5 is expected as gold solution modifies only code (optimizer.py), not config files (AGENTS.md).
